scripts.dev: concurrently -c auto -n orchestrator,jornada-api,jornada-web,censo-api,censo-web,cc-api,cc-web,web-shell "npm run dev --workspace=apps/api-orchestrator" "npm run dev --workspace=modules/jornada/api" "npm run dev --workspace=modules/jornada/web" "npm run dev --workspace=modules/censo/api" "npm run dev --workspace=modules/censo/web" "npm run dev --workspace=modules/cc/api" "npm run dev --workspace=modules/cc/web" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web-shell"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api-orchestrator && npm run build -w apps/web-shell && npm run build -w modules/jornada/web && npm run build -w modules/censo/web && npm run build -w modules/cc/web
